title: Business Process Improvement
description: A focused professional course in Business Process Improvement designed to build practical capability and confidence through expert-led sessions and real-world case application.
whoShouldAttend: This course is suitable for professionals, team leads, and managers seeking stronger skills in Business Process Improvement.
outcomes: Understand core principles and current practices in Business Process Improvement.
Apply practical frameworks to workplace challenges.
Develop an action plan for immediate implementation.

topics.title: Foundations and Core Concepts
bullets: Key terminology and principles in Business Process Improvement

topics.title: Tools, Methods, and Practice
bullets: Common pitfalls and how to avoid them
